zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Harcourt於1444年出生在英國奧可福爾斯坦頓 哈爾庫特時，她的父親Sir Robert De Harcourt34歲，母親Lady Margaret Berkeley, born Byron33歲。她於1457年與Walter Sydenham在英國英格蘭薩默塞特布普頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1477年3月30日在英國薩默塞特布普頓享年33歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Harcourt于1444年出生在英国奧可福爾斯坦頓 哈爾庫特时，她的父亲Sir Robert De Harcourt34岁，母亲Lady Margaret Berkeley, born Byron33岁。她于1457年与Walter Sydenham在英国英格兰薩默塞特布普頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1477年3月30日在英国薩默塞特布普頓享年33岁。

nameMeanings.name: Harcourt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of the places in Eure and Calvados named Harcourt, from Old French cour(t) ‘court, farmyard’ (see Court ) with an obscure first element. This surname is very rare in France.

English: habitational name from either of two places in Shropshire named Harcourt. The one near Cleobury Mortimer gets the name from Old English heafocere ‘hawker, falconer’ + cot ‘hut, cottage’; the one near Wem has as its first element Old English hearpere (see Harper ).

History: The surname of French origin (see 1 above) is listed along with the equally rare or even extinct variants or altered forms Haraucourt, Herancourt, and Héraucourt in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

variants.name: Court
meanings: English: topographic or occupational name from Middle English curt, court ‘large house’ (a word of the same ultimately Latin origin as 2 below), denoting someone who lived or worked in a manor house or castle, a courtly retainer.
French: topographic name from Old French co(u)rt ‘court, farmyard’ (from Latin cohors, cors, genitive cohortis, cortis ‘court, farmyard, enclosure’).

English and French: nickname for a physically small man, or ironically for a large man, from the adjective Middle English curt, Old French co(u)rt ‘short, small’ (from Latin curtus ‘curtailed, truncated, cut short, broken off’). Compare French Lecourt .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Harcourt was born in 1444, in Stanton Harcourt, Oxfordshire, England, her father, Sir Robert De Harcourt, was 34 and her mother, Lady Margaret Berkeley, born Byron, was 33. She married Walter Sydenham in 1457, in Brympton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 30 March 1477, in Brympton, Somerset, England, at the age of 33.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Harcourt est née en 1444, à Stanton Harcourt, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert De Harcourt, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Berkeley, born Byron, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Walter Sydenham en 1457, à Brympton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 30 mars 1477, à Brympton, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 33 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Harcourt 1444 in Stanton Harcourt, Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Robert De Harcourt 34 und ihre Mutter Lady Margaret Berkeley, born Byron 33. Sie hat 1457 in Brympton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom Walter Sydenham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 30. März 1477 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Brympton, Somerset, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Harcourt è nata il nel 1444 nel Stanton Harcourt, Oxfordshire, England, sua padre, Sir Robert De Harcourt, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Lady Margaret Berkeley, born Byron, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Walter Sydenham nel 1457, nel Brympton, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 30 marzo 1477, nel Brympton, Somerset, England, all'età di 33 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Harcourtが1444年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアスタントン ハーコウルトで生まれた時，父Sir Robert De Harcourtは34歳，母Lady Margaret Berkeley, born Byronは33歳であった。1457年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトブリンプトンでWalter Sydenhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1477年3月30日にイギリスソメルセトブリンプトンで33歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Harcourt(이)가 1444년 영국 스퍼드실르 스탠턴 하르쿠르트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert De Harcourt(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Margaret Berkeley, born Byron(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1457년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 브리프턴에서 Walter Sydenham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1477년 3월 30일 영국 서머세트 브리프턴에서 33세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Harcourt nasceu em 1444, em Stanton Harcourt, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert De Harcourt, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret Berkeley, born Byron, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Walter Sydenham em 1457, em Brympton, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 30 de março de 1477, em Brympton, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 33 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Harcourt родилась в 1444 г. в местности стантон харкоурт, оксфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Robert De Harcourt было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Berkeley, born Byron, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Walter Sydenham в 1457 г. в местности бримптон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 30 марта 1477 г. в местности бримптон, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 33 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Harcourt nació en 1444, en Stanton Harcourt, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert De Harcourt, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Lady Margaret Berkeley, born Byron, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Walter Sydenham en 1457, en Brympton, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 30 de marzo de 1477, en Brympton, Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 33 años.
